steps.title: Read the inequality terms
steps.content: In the inequality $9x+13y\leq 104$, each term is a unit price multiplied by a number of pizzas.

steps.title: Interpret the large pizza term
steps.content: The variable $y$ is the number of large veggie pizzas, and $13$ is the cost per large veggie pizza. Therefore, $13y$ is the total amount Jordan spends on large veggie pizzas. The answer is C.
